Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power.

● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues
Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally.
Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory!

● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined
Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast!

● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story!
Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne.

● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life
With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate!
You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings.

● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm
A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips:

Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush.
Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision!

● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked
At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile!

About New One Studio

An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage.

Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan.

Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress.

In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage.

In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you!

(Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.)

us.description:
Your Camera, Your Looks, Your Way.

Moment Pro Camera II turns your phone into your favorite camera for photography and filmmaking. Shoot like a pro with full manual controls, creative looks, and an upgraded interface – all in one intuitive app.

What’s New in Pro Camera II?

Our first pro camera app has been the #1 rated camera app for years. Now, it’s time for the next chapter. We’ve re-engineered Pro Camera II from the ground up to give you better performance, advanced controls, and new customizable interfaces and shooting modes.

Key Features:

• Pro-Level Exposure Control – Our smart exposure system allows you to take control with Shutter Priority, ISO Priority, Manual, and Auto exposure modes, including the ability to limit Auto ISO to a specific range.
• Upgraded White Balance – Beyond auto white balance, you can manually configure temperature and tint, choose a preset, or calibrate via a gray card.
• Advanced Photo Options – Control the level of processing and HDR applied to your photos. Shoot in RAW, ProRAW, TIFF, HEIF, or JPG.
• Cinematic Video Tools – Apple Log, Open Gate, ProRes, 10-bit recording, and more. Adjust the resolution, color space, frame rate, codec, bitrate, and chroma subsampling for total creative freedom.
• Precision Monitoring – Get pro-level feedback with Waveform, RGB Histograms, and audio meters — normally reserved for cinema cameras.
• Aspect Ratio – Frame your shot within your favorite aspect ratio (4:3, 16:9, 3:2, 5:4, 1:1)
• Designed for All Creators – A beautiful, intuitive interface that adapts to how you shoot. Swipe, tap, and adjust anything immediately with one hand (including a dedicated left-handed layout), or go distraction-free with Zen Mode. Works natively in landscape orientation.
• Looks, Your Way – Apply creative Looks or import your own LUTs to video and photos. Preview them live, bake them into your footage, or adjust intensity on the fly.
• Focus Tools That Just Work – Separate reticles for exposure and focus with a tap, or dial in the shot with Manual Focus and Focus Peaking.
• Quick Actions, Faster Shooting – One swipe to reach your most used tools: flash, stabilization, zebras, focus peaking, grids, and more.
• Intuitive Lens Control – Remove the guesswork of which lens you are using and eliminate surprises with our Optic Controls. Say goodbye to shaky zoom with our fluid zoom control.
• Hardware-Ready – Optimized for every iPhone, with seamless integration for external mics and Moment’s entire lens + case ecosystem.

Upcoming Feature Releases
• Look Store: purchase creator color grades and film emulations
• Slow Shutter and Timelapse modes
• Advanced Profile sharing and collaboration tools
• Extended hardware integration partnerships

We love hearing from our community. For feature requests, ideas, or support, email us at hello@shopmoment.com or message us @momentprocamera on social media.

Fully Compatible with iPhone and Moment's complete ecosystem of lenses, cases, and accessories.

us.description:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game
Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures.

Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters
Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles.

Explore this monster adventure game
Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. 

Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter
Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer?

Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer
Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer?

Key Features:
- Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide
- 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve.
- No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame!
- A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay.
- Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements.
- Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo.
- Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards.
- Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game.
- Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs.

Why Players Love EvoCreo 2:
Fans of Monster-Catching games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home.
A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy.
Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure.

Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

us.description:
The best interactive app for learning musculoskeletal anatomy. 

AnatomyMapp® combines an empowering collection of study tools for the popular Trail Guide to the Body—a best-selling musculoskeletal anatomy textbook—into a single interactive app! It's great for not only reinforcing your textbook learning but also for studying while on the bus, having a snack, or pretty much wherever you have your phone.
 
AnatomyMapp® includes information from all 362 Trail Guide to the Body Flashcards; questions from the Trail Guide to the Body Student Workbook; and easy search and bookmarking capabilities:

• Test your musculoskeletal anatomy knowledge by (1) answering multiple choice question (muscle cards only); (2) locating specific structures; or (3) identifying actions, origins, insertions, and nerve innervations (AOIN).

• Bookmark specific cards to review later and use enhanced navigation features for bookmarked cards.

• Apply the easy search function to choose all cards or only cards you’ve bookmarked.

• Find additional information in the Trail Guide to the Body textbook with page references on each card.

• Zoom into cards to enhance your view of the illustrations.

• Learn correct pronunciation using the app’s audio pronunciation.
 
• Designed to be viewed in both landscape and portrait on iPad, and portrait mode on iPhone.

If you have any comments or suggestions, we’d like to hear from you at info@booksofdiscovery.com.
 
More than 2,000 manual therapy programs have chosen Trail Guide to the Body products for their students. The textbook is sold in nearly 40 countries.
 
AnatomyMapp® is a registered trademark of Books of Discovery. Learn more at booksofdiscovery.com.

Strongbox Pro is available here for outright and upfront purchase instead of via an In-App Purchase upgrade. This version of Strongbox is identical to the much loved Strongbox application with all the Pro features and the same regular update schedule.

Strongbox is an application for keeping all your passwords safely stored and protected by one master password. Supporting the open source Password Safe and KeePass formats. 

*** Supports Family Sharing ***

*** Features ***
- Face ID/Touch ID Unlock for the ultimate in convenience, security and speed.

- PIN Code Unlock with a Duress PIN option for those tricky situations.

- Passkey support - The latest, most convenient and most secure authentication method (passkeys).

- YubiKey protection - secure your databases with a hardware token.

- Secure - protected by time tested military grade cryptography.

- Private - Isolated In-App attachments viewer for your sensitive documents, photos & videos.

- Audit your passwords - Automatically check your database for weak passwords including a 'Have I Been Pwned?' check.

- Cloud Support, so you can access your cloud safes using iCloud, Dropbox, OneDrive, Google Drive, WebDAV or SFTP even when offline. Use the built in Files app for many other storage options or store them securely only on your local device. You choose your storage.

- Search your entire set of passwords and secrets instantly and powerfully, with deep search. Autocomplete new entries, and auto generate secure passwords. 

- Compatible - Import/Export by Files app, Email, CSV, iTunes File Sharing or use cloud storage.

- Standards compliant - using the time tested Password Safe and KeePass formats so you can import any existing password safe you have.

- Features galore 
   - Incredibly configurable password generation including Diceware (XKCD) & regular passwords.
   - Timed Auto Clear Clipboard.
   - Entry History.
   - KeePass Field References, Tags, Custom Icon & FavIcons (including automatic search & download).
   - Two Factor Authentication codes (TOTP) - QR Code, Steam & Manual.

---------------------------------------------------------------------

• Strongbox Privacy Policy may be found here: https://strongboxsafe.com/privacy-policy/
• Strongbox Terms of Use may be found here: https://strongboxsafe.com/terms/

tr.description:
Dash for Tesla is a Bluetooth-based digital dashboard app for users who want to view essential driving information on their phone.

No account login, no cloud authorization, and no additional hardware are required. With a supported Bluetooth connection, users can connect locally and view basic information such as vehicle speed and selected vehicle status.

Key Features

- No account login required
No vehicle platform account or password is required, and no remote API authorization is needed.

- Local Bluetooth connection
Connects through supported Bluetooth capabilities and displays essential information such as speed and selected vehicle status on your phone.

- Focused dashboard experience
Presents commonly used driving information in a clear and simple layout for quick viewing.

- Multiple visual styles
Offers different backgrounds and theme styles to match personal preferences.

- Local-first design
Primarily relies on local Bluetooth communication instead of cloud services, allowing relevant local features to remain available even in weak or offline network conditions.

Privacy and Security

- No account registration is required.
- Vehicle data is not stored long-term on self-hosted servers.
- Permissions such as Bluetooth and location are used only for local connection, communication, and related display features.

Use Cases

- Users who want a simple digital dashboard experience on their phone.
- Users who do not want to provide account credentials or rely on cloud-based remote access.
- Users who prefer not to install additional hardware devices.

Important Notice

Dash for Tesla is a third-party independently developed app and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially associated with Tesla, Inc. or its affiliates.

This app only provides basic information display based on supported Bluetooth capabilities and does not provide any vehicle modification, flashing, or hacking functionality.

Subscription Information

Dash for Tesla Premium offers auto-renewable subscriptions.

Available subscriptions:
- Monthly Plan
- Yearly Plan

Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase.
Subscription automatically renews unless it is canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.
You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time in your App Store account settings.

Privacy Policy: https://tdash.cn/privacy.html
Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

tr.description:
Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest!

Your honorable quest is to save the world!

The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic!

Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology!

Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean.

It’s all or nothing on your glorious path!

With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures!

What are you waiting for?

Like no other game in the Action RPG genre, Titan Quest: Legendary Edition combines the fascinating world of mythology with endless and exciting action that you would expect from such a compelling game!

Features:
+ Within the world of the Immortal Throne DLC, you’ll encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx. You have to interpret the prophecies of the blind seer Tiresias, fight alongside Agamemnon and Achilles, and use the wiles of Odysseus to conquer this dark new adventure.

+ In the uncharted lands of northern Europe in the Ragnarök DLC, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!

+ Meet an explorer in the Atlantis DLC, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. A key is supposedly hidden in the diary of Herakles, which is rumored to be located in the Phoenician City of Gadir. Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!

+ All important updates have been implemented to the technically overhauled Titan Quest to grant the best gaming experience of this classic ever!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs available as in-app purchase - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

! A note for all players who own the base version of Titan Quest: The DLCs mentioned here are also available for purchase as additional content so that all fans can upgrade their game to fully enjoy all expansions!

tr.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

tr.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

tr.description:
Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game!


A New Adventure Begins!
Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp!
Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy.

How Deep will you Delve?
The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention.
You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive!


Choose Your Path
You’ll need a good pair of boots, a sharp sword, and all your roguish skills to survive in the dungeon. Along the way, you’ll acquire new items, abilities, and allies that will help you achieve victory!
Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play."


Many Ways to Play
Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world!

However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

tr.releaseNotes:
The sandworms stir. Covert spies infiltrate the desert planet under deep cover. The spice flows stronger than ever, and beneath it all, everything points to the escalation of war. An insurrection looms on the horizon, and it’s coming your way in Dune: Imperium – Uprising.

Dune: Imperium - Uprising expansion includes the following:
- New board
- New mechanics
- Sandworms
- Contracts
- Spies 
- 9 Leaders
- 69 Imperium Deck cards
- 44 Intrigue cards
- 16 Conflict cards
- A new reserve card - Prepare the Way
- CHOAM Module
- 10 Challenges
- Uprising Skirmish rule and scoring mods
- New Achievements 
Bug Fixes
- Tech Tile count now displays correctly when a stack is emptied 
- Tech Tile tray now automatically opens when you’re being prompted to activate something from it 
- Troop Transports prompt should be more clearly when using it outside of normal turn timings
- You can no longer buy Duncan Idaho too early in the second Tutorial
- Added warning when an acquire ability couldn’t be used due to hitting supply limits
- Shadout Mapes’s reveal ability now accounts for the player gaining troops during the reveal turn
- Fixed timing for winning the Economic Supremacy conflict with a Dreadnought to work better with additional rulesets
- Lisan Al Gaib now reveals for the proper amount of persuasion

- Research track space that trashes an Intrigue card to gain an Intrigue card and draw a card now doesn’t require cards in deck or discard to select
- Helena player can now use Tleilaxu Master to acquire cards set aside via Manipulate

- Advancing on the Tleilaxu track to gain an Intrigue card now displays in the proper order

We’re grateful for your continued support in helping shape Dune: Imperium into the best experience possible. If you encounter any issues, unexpected behavior, or have feedback to share, please contact us through the in-game feedback tool or by email at support@direwolfdigital.com.

Thanks for playing Dune: Imperium. Join the struggle. Join the Uprising!
tr.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. 

Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium!

Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal.

Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader.

Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning.

Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same!

Control the Spice. Control the Universe.

Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it.

Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

tr.description:
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

tr.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

tr.description:
Chess, but all your army has gone over to the white side, leaving you with nothing but your royal shotgun and your wounded pride. Carried by your dark folly, you decide it's time to teach those white pieces to fear the Shotgun King.

Every turn, you may either move your king or shoot at enemy pieces, after what you'll need to move again to reload your shotgun. Avoid checkmate and kill the enemy king to complete the floor. After each floor, you may choose between two random combinations of one upgrade for you and one upgrade for the other side. Choose wisely and keep on winning floors and you just may get your kingdom back.

Runs may take ~20 minutes to complete. The game features 15 ranks of difficulty, unlockable cards, over 100 achievements to complete, an endless mode, and now a chase mode where you get continually assailed from all sides!

tr.description:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game
Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures.

Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters
Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles.

Explore this monster adventure game
Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. 

Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter
Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer?

Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer
Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer?

Key Features:
- Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide
- 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve.
- No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame!
- A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay.
- Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements.
- Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo.
- Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards.
- Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game.
- Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs.

Why Players Love EvoCreo 2:
Fans of Monster games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home.
A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy.
Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure.

Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

pt.description:
Dash for Tesla 是一款基于蓝牙连接的数字仪表盘应用，适合希望在手机上查看车辆基础行驶信息的用户使用。

无需登录账号、无需云端授权、无需额外硬件设备，用户可通过手机与支持蓝牙能力的车辆建立本地连接，并查看车速等基础信息。

核心功能

- 无需账号登录
无需输入车辆平台账号密码，也无需远程授权。

- 蓝牙本地连接
通过车辆支持的蓝牙能力进行本地通信，在手机上查看车速等基础信息及部分车辆状态。

- 专注数字仪表体验
以简洁直观的方式展示驾驶中常用的信息，帮助用户更快速地获取重点数据。

- 多种界面风格
提供不同的背景与主题样式，用户可根据个人偏好选择不同显示风格。

- 本地优先
主要依赖本地蓝牙通信，不依赖云端服务，在弱网或无网环境下仍可使用相关本地功能。

隐私与安全

- 无需注册账号。
- 不长期在自建服务器存储车辆数据。
- 蓝牙、定位等权限仅用于设备连接、通信及相关显示功能。

适用场景

- 希望在手机上获得简洁的数字仪表盘体验。
- 不希望提供账号密码或依赖云端远程能力。
- 不希望安装额外硬件设备。

重要说明

Dash for Tesla 为第三方独立开发应用，与 Tesla, Inc. 及其附属公司无官方合作关系，也不存在隶属关系。

本应用基于车辆支持的蓝牙能力提供基础信息展示功能，不提供任何车辆改装、破解或刷写相关能力。

订阅说明

Dash for Tesla 高级会员提供自动续订订阅服务。

可选订阅方案：
- 月度订阅
- 年度订阅

付款将在您确认购买后从 Apple ID 账户扣除。
除非您在当前订阅周期结束前至少 24 小时取消续订，否则订阅将自动续费。
系统将在当前订阅周期结束前 24 小时内收取下一周期费用。
您可以随时在 App Store 账户设置中管理或取消订阅。

pt.description:
Earthquake Network is the most comprehensive app on earthquakes and for most world countries it is the only earthquake early warning system for receiving real time alerts.

Earthquake Network gives you:

- Real time alerts if you live close to the epicentre
- Alerts seconds in advances if you live far from the epicentre
- Real time user reports on felt earthquakes
- Free earthquake data from 21 seismic networks including U.S., Puerto Rico, India, Indonesia, Turkey, Mexico, Chile, Peru, Ecuador, Argentina, Venezuela, Dominican Republic, Colombia, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, China, New Zeland, Japan, Italy, Croatia, Spain and Greece

The Earthquake Network research project (https://www.sismo.app) aims at developing a smartphone-based earthquake early warning system able to detect earthquakes in real time and to alert the population in advance. Smartphones are able to detect earthquakes thanks to the accelerometer on-board each device. When an earthquake is detected, users with the application installed are immediatly alerted. Since earthquake waves travel at around 5 km/s it is possible to alert the population not yet reached by the damaging waves of the earthquake. For the scientific details about the project please refer to the scientific paper on Frontiers at https://bit.ly/2C8B5HI

Subscriptions:

When an earthquake is detected in real time by smartphones near the epicenter, the server sends an alert to all users with the app. Alerting all users can take up to 10 seconds since it is not technically feasible to do so instantly. Now you can join the priority lists of the first 10,000 or 100,000 people alerted in real time. The following subscriptions are available:

- Subscription 10k for 1 year
- Subscription 10k for 1 month 

- Subscription 100k for 1 year
- Subscription 100k for 1 month

• Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal
• Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase
• Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable

Streets of Rage volta para uma sequência 25 anos após o último episódio: um novo sindicato do crime parece ter assumido o controle das ruas e corrompido a polícia. Tudo que você tem disponível para lutar contra eles são seus amigos... e seus punhos! pt.description:
O Titan Quest cativou legiões de jogadores desde a sua estreia em 2006. Tu recebes a experiência abrangente de uma jornada desenfreada e verdadeiramente heróica pelos mundos de Titan Quest!

A tua honrosa missão é salvar o mundo!

Sozinhos, os deuses sozinhos não conseguem derrotar os Titãs. Por isso, são necessários heróis reais - e só podes ser tu! O teu sucesso ou fracasso decidirá o destino do povo e dos Olympians! Percorre os mundos místicos e antigos da Grécia, Egito, Babilónia e China com o teu herói personalizado. Conquista as hordas de criaturas lendárias e domina várias armas e artes marciais: tiro com arco, luta de espadas ou o uso de magia poderosa!

Viaja por um mundo de antiguidade e mitologia nórdica!

Luta contra as feras da mitologia enquanto viajas para o Partenon, as Grandes Pirâmides, os Jardins Suspensos da Babilónia, a Grande Muralha, a Arena do Tártaro e outros lugares famosos. Encontra os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, descobre as terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa, procura o reino mítico da Atlântida e faz uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental.

É tudo ou nada no teu caminho glorioso!

A cada desafio que te espera, terás que derrotar inimigos maiores e mais fortes até atingires o teu objetivo e forçar os Titãs a ajoelharem! Corre para a batalha ao lado de bravos companheiros de estimação! Encontra itens extraordinários com poderes especiais que irão melhorar as tuas capacidades e ajudar-te no teu caminho. Espadas lendárias, feitiços de relâmpagos poderosos, magia, arcos e vários outros tesouros com poderes inimagináveis esperam por ti - todos eles estão à tua disposição nas tuas batalhas e espalham medo e terror entre as criaturas horríveis!

De que estás à espera?

Como nenhum outro jogo no género RPG de ação, o Titan Quest: Edição Lendária combina o fascinante mundo da mitologia com a ação interminável e emocionante que esperas de um jogo tão atraente!

Características principais:

- No DLC do Trono Imortal, encontrarás os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, enfrentarás os ataques de Cerberus e arriscarás as margens do Rio Styx. Deves interpretar as profecias do vidente cego Tirésias, lutar ao lado de Agamenon e Aquiles e usar os ardis de Odisseu para conquistar esta nova aventura sombria.

- Nas terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa no Ragnarök DLC, enfrentarás os reinos dos celtas, dos homens do norte e dos deuses Asgardianos!

- Conhece um explorador no DLC Atlantis, em busca do reino mítico da Atlântida. Uma chave está supostamente escondida no diário de Hércules, que dizem estar localizado na cidade fenícia de Gadir. Começa uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental, incluindo a Arena do Tártaro para batalhas épicas!

+ Todas as atualizações importantes foram implementadas no Titan Quest revisto tecnicamente para garantir a melhor experiência de jogo deste clássico de todos os tempos!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs disponíveis como compra in-app - Invocado pelo lendário Imperador Yao, o Herói é chamado de volta ao Leste para lidar com uma ameaça demoníaca que está devastando a terra depois que o Telkine foi morto.

+ Uma nota para todos os jogadores que possuem a versão básica do Titan Quest: Os DLCs mencionados aqui também serão lançados para compra como conteúdo adicional para que todos os fãs possam atualizar os seus jogos para desfrutarem todas as expansões!

pt.description:
Lysoniq is a premium music player/streamer with cross-device remote control. Install it on your Apple devices to seamlessly play music through any one of them and control the app with the others.

Unlike AirPlay, the playing device streams directly from Apple Music at full resolution — enabling Hi-Res Lossless with zero compression or downsampling on compatible devices. Using an iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV in your hifi system just became easier. No more extension cables or compromises.

Built to handle huge libraries — load thousands of songs into the player without slowdown. Full queue management with swipe to delete, drag to rearrange, tap to skip ahead, and insert into the queue. True Shuffle that actually randomizes your music. 

Browse the full Apple Music catalog with top songs, albums, and playlists across 30+ cities and countries, 17 genres, and dedicated Hi-Res Lossless and Dolby Atmos sections. Access Made For You, Recently Played, New Releases, live radio stations, and all of Apple Music's personalized recommendations. Your full synced library with sorting and filtering included.

Connect and control devices across your home Wi-Fi network with LYNQ. Extend connectivity across cellular data and different Wi-Fi networks with the LYNQ+ subscription.

Built-in Last.fm scrobbling with full history and stats. Four themes including Light, Dark, True Light, and True Dark.

Built from the ground up with audiophiles in mind. Reviewing audio gear? Use a subloop to focus in on a particular section of a track, with the option to add a timer between loops to switch equipment. Automatic sample rate switching on macOS — the system output adjusts to match each track's native resolution, so nothing gets resampled (up to 24-bit/96kHz). Output up to 24-bit/192kHz on iOS, 24-bit/96kHz on macOS, and 24-bit/48kHz on Apple TV.

Now available in 20 languages including Chinese (Hong Kong, Simplified, and Traditional), Dutch, Finnish, French, German, Hebrew, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese (Portugal), Russian, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish, and Turkish.

Provide feedback to guide its development further and get the features you want. Enjoy all future updates with a one-time purchase.

Requires Apple Music installed on your devices and an active Apple Music subscription. See https://www.lysoniq.app/support for more details.

Terms of Use: https://www.lysoniq.app/terms
License Agreement (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Compatibility includes iOS 16.4+, macOS 14.6+, tvOS 17.6+

戏曲锣鼓是一款专为戏曲爱好者打造的虚拟打击乐器应用，让你在手机或平板上，随时随地体验传统戏曲锣鼓演奏的魅力。应用内收录多种经典戏曲打击乐器，并支持高度自定义配置，满足不同戏曲流派、演奏风格与个人创作需求。本应用主要有以下特点：

- 简单易用，初学者友好：界面简洁直观，无论是戏曲初学者还是专业爱好者，都能快速上手。通过触屏即可轻松演奏，随时体验传统锣鼓节奏。

- 丰富的戏曲锣鼓乐器：内置多种经典戏曲打击乐器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大锣、小锣、风锣、铙钹、小钹、广钹、板鼓、板、梆子、碰铃、木鱼、引磬、铛子、大磬、钟、手鼓，并提供不同力度音色，还原真实演奏体验。

- 高性能无延迟演奏：敲击即响，声音响应迅速；支持快速连续击打、多点触控与多音同时打击，演奏流畅不卡顿、不串音。

- 强大的键盘自定义系统：支持自由调整键盘布局、行列数量、按键大小与间距，支持拖拽交换按键位置，支持背景外观配置，打造更符合个人习惯的戏曲锣鼓演奏界面。

- 灵活的按钮配置：支持按钮颜色自定义、按键图片显示、按键名称修改等功能，每个按键最多可绑定 3 个乐器音色，实现个性化锣鼓经与专属打击垫配置。

- 录音与回放功能：支持实时录制戏曲锣鼓演奏过程，一键保存精彩演奏内容，并可随时回放练习成果，方便记录灵感、复盘节奏与分享作品。

立即下载，开启属于你的戏曲锣鼓演奏之旅！如遇到错误或提供意见与建议，请联系邮箱：yuliuapp@icloud.com

Uma nova aventura começa!
"Clank!, o icônico jogo de aventura de tabuleiro de construção de baralho desafia os ladrões ousados a se infiltrarem no covil do dragão, roubar um de seus preciosos artefatos e escapar antes de virar churrasco!

pt.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. 

Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium!

Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal.

Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader.

Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning.

Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same!

Control the Spice. Control the Universe.

Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it.

Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

pt.description:
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

pt.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

pt.description:
This is a single-session, save-file turn-based strategy game inspired by the gameplay mechanics of Heroes of Might and Magic, featuring fast-paced auto-chess mode combat.

The game is set in the Age of Empires universe and features multiple civilizations, each reflecting the unique characteristics of historical nations such as French, Chinese, Ancient Roman, and others。 The game adopts  Q-style pixel art aesthetic, blending cute character proportions with retro-inspired visual presentation.

Within each session, players must strategically develop their homeland, train heroes, build armies, explore dynamic maps, and employ tactical combinations to outmaneuver opponents and achieve final victory

pt.description:
Your Camera, Your Looks, Your Way.

Moment Pro Camera II turns your phone into your favorite camera for photography and filmmaking. Shoot like a pro with full manual controls, creative looks, and an upgraded interface – all in one intuitive app.

What’s New in Pro Camera II?

Our first pro camera app has been the #1 rated camera app for years. Now, it’s time for the next chapter. We’ve re-engineered Pro Camera II from the ground up to give you better performance, advanced controls, and new customizable interfaces and shooting modes.

Key Features:

• Pro-Level Exposure Control – Our smart exposure system allows you to take control with Shutter Priority, ISO Priority, Manual, and Auto exposure modes, including the ability to limit Auto ISO to a specific range.
• Upgraded White Balance – Beyond auto white balance, you can manually configure temperature and tint, choose a preset, or calibrate via a gray card.
• Advanced Photo Options – Control the level of processing and HDR applied to your photos. Shoot in RAW, ProRAW, TIFF, HEIF, or JPG.
• Cinematic Video Tools – Apple Log, Open Gate, ProRes, 10-bit recording, and more. Adjust the resolution, color space, frame rate, codec, bitrate, and chroma subsampling for total creative freedom.
• Precision Monitoring – Get pro-level feedback with Waveform, RGB Histograms, and audio meters — normally reserved for cinema cameras.
• Aspect Ratio – Frame your shot within your favorite aspect ratio (4:3, 16:9, 3:2, 5:4, 1:1)
• Designed for All Creators – A beautiful, intuitive interface that adapts to how you shoot. Swipe, tap, and adjust anything immediately with one hand (including a dedicated left-handed layout), or go distraction-free with Zen Mode. Works natively in landscape orientation.
• Looks, Your Way – Apply creative Looks or import your own LUTs to video and photos. Preview them live, bake them into your footage, or adjust intensity on the fly.
• Focus Tools That Just Work – Separate reticles for exposure and focus with a tap, or dial in the shot with Manual Focus and Focus Peaking.
• Quick Actions, Faster Shooting – One swipe to reach your most used tools: flash, stabilization, zebras, focus peaking, grids, and more.
• Intuitive Lens Control – Remove the guesswork of which lens you are using and eliminate surprises with our Optic Controls. Say goodbye to shaky zoom with our fluid zoom control.
• Hardware-Ready – Optimized for every iPhone, with seamless integration for external mics and Moment’s entire lens + case ecosystem.

Upcoming Feature Releases
• Look Store: purchase creator color grades and film emulations
• Slow Shutter and Timelapse modes
• Advanced Profile sharing and collaboration tools
• Extended hardware integration partnerships

We love hearing from our community. For feature requests, ideas, or support, email us at hello@shopmoment.com or message us @momentprocamera on social media.

Fully Compatible with iPhone and Moment's complete ecosystem of lenses, cases, and accessories.

pt.description:
Junta-te a milhões de jogadores na sequência do jogo de monstros Pocket Monster.
Embarca numa aventura épica em EvoCreo 2, o RPG de captura de monstros no mundo de Shoru. Descobre criaturas míticas chamadas Creo, que vagam pela terra com origens e evolução misteriosas. Tens o que é necessário para desvendar os segredos dos Creo e tornar-te um lendário Monster Hunter e Evoking Master Trainer?

Descobre um jogo de aventura envolvente
Inicia a tua jornada como recruta na Academia de Polícia de Shoru. Monstros Creo estão a desaparecer, e a tua missão é descobrir a verdade por trás destes eventos misteriosos. Mas há mais nesta história do que parece – intrigas sombrias estão a formar-se, e as tuas habilidades como Monster Hunter serão desafiadas. Ajuda os cidadãos de Shoru, completando mais de 50 missões, formando alianças e descobrindo tesouros escondidos.

Captura e treina mais de 300 monstros
Adoras jogos de Monster e captura de monstros? Cria a tua equipa de sonhos com Creo neste RPG de mundo aberto. Caça monstros raros e lendários, cada um disponível em cores alternativas exclusivas. Com mais de 300 monstros únicos para capturar, evoluir e treinar, terás várias possibilidades para personalizar a tua estratégia. Cria combinações poderosas e leva os teus Creo à vitória em emocionantes batalhas por turnos como um verdadeiro Monster Hunter.

Explora este jogo de aventura
Desfruta de mais de 30 horas de jogabilidade offline e online num mundo aberto ricamente detalhado. De florestas densas a cavernas misteriosas e cidades movimentadas, o continente de Shoru está cheio de segredos. Aventura-te por diferentes ambientes, completa missões desafiantes e descobre caminhos secretos para tesouros lendários. Explora 2 novos biomas nesta sequência de jogos de monstros, como a deslumbrante Wüste, e encontra muitos monstros na tua jornada.

Domina um sistema de combate profundo e estratégico
Prepara-te para batalhas de Monster Duel com um sistema personalizável. Equipa os teus monstros com itens e desbloqueia mais de 100 características únicas. Treina os teus monstros para aprender mais de 200 movimentos, que podes trocar a qualquer momento para te adaptaste aos novos desafios. Enfrenta oponentes ferozes, gere as fraquezas elementares e utiliza as tuas habilidades táticas em batalhas por turnos. Conseguirás tornar-te um mestre dos Pocket Monsters e capturá-los todos?

Prova-te como o/a Mestre Treinador/a definitivo/a
Desafia os treinadores mais fortes de Shoru e sobe nas classificações neste RPG pago. Luta no Coliseu, onde apenas os melhores Monster Hunter Trainers serão coroados campeões. Conquistarás todas as batalhas RPG e alcançarás o título de Evoking Master Trainer, tornando-te um dos melhores jogadores neste jogo de monstros?

Características principais:
- Continuação de um dos jogos pagos mais populares do mundo
- Mais de 300 monstros colecionáveis para capturar, treinar e evoluir
- Sem limite de nível para os seus monstros - final de jogo envolvente!
- Um vasto mundo aberto com mais de 30 horas de jogabilidade offline e online
- Batalhas por turnos emocionantes com elementos de estratégia de batalha profundos
- Centenas de movimentos e características para personalizar os teus Creo
- Mais de 50 missões cheias de aventura e recompensas
- Jogo offline – sem necessidade de internet para aproveitar o jogo
- Gráficos em pixel art, lembrando os clássicos RPGs de monstros

Por que os jogadores amam EvoCreo 2:
Fãs de jogos de Monstros vão se sentir em casa.

A mistura perfeita de coleção de monstros, exploração de mundo aberto e estratégia de batalha.
Jogadores casuais e hardcore vão adorar a combinação de ação e aventura neste RPG de monstros.

Junta-te à aventura hoje e começa a tua jornada para te tornares o mestre definitivo dos Monster Hunters em EvoCreo 2! Conseguirás capturá-los todos e dominar os segredos dos Creo? Um jogo fantástico de captura de monstros espera por ti!

pt.description:
O Strongbox é uma aplicação para manter todas suas senhas armazenadas com segurança e protegidas por uma senha mestra. São suportados of formatos abertos PasswordSafe e KeePass.

*** Funcionalidades ***
- Desbloqueio com Face ID/Touch ID para garantir a maior conveniência, segurança e velocidade de acesso possiveis.

- Desbloqueio com Código PIN com opção de PIN sob Coerção para lidar com situações difíceis.

- Proteção YubiKey - proteja suas bases de dados com um token físico.

- Seguro - protegido por criptografia de nível militar.

- Privativo - Um visualizador de anexos embutido no aplicativo protege seus documentos, fotos e vídeos.

- Audite suas senhas - Automaticamente consulte se sua base de dados contém senhas fracas, incluindo consultas com o 'Have I Been Pwned'.

- Suporte a Nuvem, para que você consiga acessar seus cofres armazenados no iCloud, Dropbox, OneDrive, Google Drive, WebDAV ou SFTP mesmo quando estiver offline. Use o app Arquivos para ter muito mais opções de armazenamento ou guarde seu cofre de maneira segura apenas no seu dispositivo. Você escolhe onde guardar seu cofre.

- Consulte todas as suas senhas e segredos instantaneamente usando uma busca poderosa e profunda. Autocomplete novos registros e gere automaticamente senhas seguras.

- Compatível - Importe/Exporte usando o app Arquivos, Email, CSV, Compartilhamento de Arquivos do iTunes ou armazenamento na nuvem.

- Padrões da Indústria - São usados os formatos já testados pelo tempo Password Safe e KeePass, então você pode importar qualquer cofre de senhas que tiver.

- Abundância de Funcionalidades
	- Geração de senhas incrivelmente configurável incluindo Diceware (XKCD) e senhas normais.
	- Auto limpeza da área de transferência após tempo definido.
	- Histórico de registro.
	- Referências de Campos do KeePass, Etiquetas, Ícones Personalizados, FavIcons (incluindo busca e download automáticos).
	- Suporte a geração de códigos de Autenticação em Duas Etapas (TOTP) - QR Codes, Steam e Manuais.
	
	*** O Strongbox é Freemium ***
Isso significa que o Strongbox é gratuito com um conjunto básico de funcionalidades, mas se você quiser existem funcionalidades melhoradas na versão Pro. Você pode se inscrever em um Período de Testes Gratuito por 90 dias para testar todas as funcionalidades Pro que quiser, sem obrigações, mas a maioria das pessoas considera a versão gratuita perfeitamente adequada.

---------------------------------------------------------------------
• O Strongbox provê Compras no Aplicativo (tanto para assinaturas auto renováveis quanto para o pagamento único) das versões Pro do App.
• Uma opção de pagamento adiantado (que não é feita dentro do App) também existe, consulte o site do Strongbox para mais detalhes.
• Assinaturas são auto renováveis com pagamentos recorrentes. Cancele a qualquer momento.
• Os períodos de tempo das assinaturas são mensal, trimestral ou anual, à escolha do usuário.
• O usuário também pode escolher comprar, com um pagamento único, uma versão Pro vitalícia do App.
• O pagamento será cobrado da sua Conta iTunes na confirmação da compra.
• A assinatura é renovada automaticamente a menos que a auto renovação seja desativada com pelo menos 24 horas de antecedência do fim do período atual.
• A Conta iTunes será cobrada pela renovação dentro das 24 horas antecedentes ao fim do período atual, e identificará o custo da renovação.
• Assinaturas podem ser gerenciadas e a auto renovação pode ser desligada na página de Configuração da Conta após a compra.
• Qualquer porção não utilizada do período de testes, se oferecido, será revogada quando o usuário comprar uma assinatura onde aplicável.
• A Política de Privacidade pode ser encontrada aqui: https://strongboxsafe.com/privacy-policy
• Os Termos de Uso podem ser encontrados aqui: https://strongboxsafe.com/terms
